chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-524 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Before; Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui. Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of M.A. No.2356/2017. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4454/2017. 4. For hearing of main case. 11.05.2022 Petitioner in person. Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan. == As per petitioner, he was appointed by the respondents as “Mali” in year 2008. Subsequently was asked to discharge his duty as “Naib Qasid”. His services are not being regularized, therefore, by way of instant petition the petitioner has sought for direction against the respondents to regularize him in service with all back benefits. As per comments filed by the respondents the petitioner was never appointed by them but he simply was engaged as a part-time “Mali” in year 2008 on daily-wages basis and no order for continuation of his service was ever issued. All the posts for regular appointment were advertised, the petitioner could not qualify the requisite test to be appointed so. The petitioner being part-time employee engaged on daily-wages basis could hardly be directed to be taken-up in service on regular basis with all back benefits particularly when he could not qualify the requisite test for his appointment when the posts were advertised formally. Consequently, the instant petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with the listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish*
